svg.title: ClusterWeave BGC and GCF context
svg.desc: Compact rank-aligned taxonomy with absolute BGC bars, proportional GCF status bars, a lower-triangular Jaccard matrix, and a ranked link table with fixed-width class-composition bars. The layout adapts to mixed, fungal-only, or bacterial-only inputs.

g.text: Per genome: unique GCFs also found in at least one other submitted genome, divided by all unique GCFs assigned to that genome.Shared · % of genome GCFs.
